name: Campbell's Turkey Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup (I use cream of potato soup)
1 1/2 cups Cooked Turkey or Chicken, Cubed
1 small Zucchini, cut in half length-wise and thinly sliced (about 1 cup. Using 2 small zucchinis makes it tastier!)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the soup, milk, Parmesan cheese, onion, and sour cream. Stir in the turkey and zucchini. Add the spaghetti; gently toss to coat.
2. Spoon into a 1-1/2 quart baking dish or casserole. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbling. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
Prep time: 20 minutes
Cook time: 30 minutes
